title: AN ACT TO DEFINE THE BASELINES OF THE TERRITORIAL SEA OF THE PHILIPPINES

chunks.text:
Section 1. The baselines for the territorial sea of the Philippines are hereby defined and described specifically as follows:

SEC. 2. All waters within, the baselines provided for in Section one hereof are considered inland or internal waters of the Philippines.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1961.
